title: Governance Evolution Log
description: Tracks governance artifact effectiveness over time — citation counts, violation rates, promotion/deprecation candidates, and events for meta-compounding

id.description: Unique governance evolution log entry identifier

artifact.description: File path of the governance artifact being tracked (e.g., policies/scientific-objectivity-policy.yaml, constitutions/default.constitution.md)

citation_count.description: Number of times this artifact has been cited in governance decisions, directives, or conflict resolutions

violation_count.description: Number of times agents have violated this artifact

promotion_candidate.description: True if usage exceeds promotion threshold (e.g., 3+ citations, sustained high compliance)

deprecation_candidate.description: True if artifact is unused for extended period (e.g., 90+ days uncited)

events.description: Chronological record of governance events involving this artifact

context.description: What happened — decision ID, directive ID, violation details, etc.

effectiveness.description: Tetravalent belief state (T/F/U/C) assessing whether this artifact is effectively serving its purpose

recommendation.description: Recommended action based on metrics and events

created_at.description: When this log entry was created

last_updated.description: When this log entry was last updated
